title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
